name: Corned Beef Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Green Bell Pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in the hot water and vinegar.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: shredded corned beef, finely chopped onion, green bell pepper, and celery.
4. If desired, add spicy mustard for a spicier salad.
5. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold and chill until firm.
Serves 8 to 10
Variation: Two tablespoons of horseradish may be substituted for the mustard.
